name: Sotheby's
description: Sotheby's is a premier global destination for art and luxury, offering a wide range of services including auctions, private sales, e-commerce, and retail. Founded in London in 1744, the company has established a reputation as one of the world's oldest and most prestigious auction houses, facilitating the sale of fine art, jewelry, watches, wine, and collectibles. Sotheby's operates globally with a network of offices and salerooms in major cities, providing collectors with access to exceptional objects and advisory services.
